case_title: CHAO QIANG LIN VS. JOSEFINA CAMPOS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIN, CHAO QIANG AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, JOSEFINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, JOSEFINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, CHAO QIANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, JOSEFINA $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $118.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,618.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-22-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-12-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$68.95);PROOF OF SERVICE FORM STAMPED: "BY FAX" SERVED DEC-23-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, JOSEFINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.
